title: dolichos falciformis
intro: Dolichos falciformis, also known as the climbing bean, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dolichos falciformis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and pods can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
